description.en: StartMessaging Refund Policy. Understand refund eligibility, process, and timelines for our messaging services.

title.pt: Política de Reembolso e Saldo de Carteira
title.es: Política de Reembolso y Saldo de Cartera

subtitle.en: Transparent terms regarding refund eligibility, unused prepaid wallet credits, active subscription cancellations, billing dispute resolutions, and payment operator conditions. Last updated: June 1, 2026.
subtitle.pt: Termos transparentes sobre a elegibilidade de reembolso, créditos de carteira pré-paga não utilizados, cancelamentos de assinatura ativos, resoluções de disputas de cobrança e condições de operadoras de pagamento. Última atualização: 1 de junho de 2026.
subtitle.es: Términos transparentes con respecto a la elegibilidad de reembolso, créditos de billetera prepagos no utilizados, cancelaciones de suscripción activas, resoluciones de disputas de facturación y condiciones del operador de pago. Última actualización: 1 de junio de 2026.
subtitle.id: Ketentuan transparan mengenai kelayakan pengembalian dana, kredit dompet prabayar yang tidak terpakai, pembatalan langganan aktif, penyelesaian perselisihan penagihan, dan kondisi operator pembayaran. Terakhir diperbarui: 1 Juni 2026.
subtitle.ar: شروط تفصيلية تتعلق بأهلية الاسترداد، وأرصدة المحفظة مسبقة الدفع غير المستخدمة، وإلغاء الاشتراكات النشطة، وتسوية نزاعات الفواتير، وشروط مشغلي الدفع. آخر تحديث: 1 يونيو 2026.
subtitle.tr: İade uygunluğu, kullanılmayan ön ödemeli cüzdan kredileri, aktif abonelik iptalleri, fatura itiraz çözümleri ve ödeme sağlayıcısı koşullarına ilişkin şeffaf kurallarımız. Son güncelleme: 1 Haziran 2026.

content.en:
1. General Policy

StartMessaging operates on a monthly subscription and pay-as-you-go message usage billing model. This Refund Policy outlines when refunds may be issued and the process for requesting one for subscription fees and message volume credits.

2. Subscription Refunds

2.1 Monthly Subscriptions

Monthly subscription fees (Premium and Enterprise plans) are non-refundable once the billing period has started. If you cancel mid-cycle, you retain access to the Service until the end of the current billing period, and no prorated refunds will be issued.

2.2 Annual Subscriptions

If you purchased an annual subscription, you may request a prorated refund within 14 days of purchase, provided you have not used more than 10% of your included monthly message allocation. After 14 days, annual subscription fees are fully non-refundable.

3. Message Volume Credits

Pay-as-you-go message volume charges are deducted based on actual sends. If you believe there has been a billing error or system discrepancy, you may request a correction within 14 days. We do not issue refunds for messages successfully delivered to or processed by partner messaging networks.

4. Eligible Refund Scenarios

We may issue refunds or service credits in the following situations:

  • Service outage: If our API experiences sustained downtime (more than 4 consecutive hours) that prevents message transmission, we will credit your account proportionally for the affected period.
  • Billing errors: If you were charged incorrectly due to a system error, we will issue a full refund of the overcharged amount.
  • Duplicate charges: If you were charged twice for the same service, we will refund the duplicate charge immediately.

5. Non-Eligible Scenarios

Refunds will NOT be issued for:

  • Messages successfully delivered to recipients (regardless of whether the recipient read or responded).
  • Change of mind or business decision to stop using the Service.
  • Unused free-tier messages (they expire monthly and do not carry over).
  • Account suspension or termination due to violation of the Terms of Use.
  • Third-party charges (Meta's WhatsApp conversation charges are non-refundable through us — contact Meta directly).

6. How to Request a Refund

To request a refund, send an email to startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com with:

  • Your registered email address and company name
  • The transaction or invoice number
  • The reason for your refund request
  • Any supporting documentation (screenshots, error logs)

We will review your request and respond within 5 business days. Approved refunds are processed within 10 business days via the original payment method.

7. Dispute Resolution

If you disagree with our refund decision, you may escalate the matter by responding to our decision email with additional information. We will conduct a final review within 10 business days. If the dispute remains unresolved, it shall be governed by the dispute resolution provisions in our Terms of Use.

8. Contact

For refund inquiries: startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com | Phone: +91 6376383348
content.in:
1. General Policy

StartMessaging operates on a prepaid wallet model for SMS and OTP services in India, and a subscription/usage model for WhatsApp. This policy outlines when refunds may be issued for prepaid wallet top-ups and how billing disputes are resolved.

2. Prepaid Wallet Balance

Wallet credits purchased for SMS and OTP APIs do not expire and remain active for eligible message sends. Wallet balance is pre-funded in INR by the user via Razorpay.

3. Refund Requests for Wallet Top-ups

If you wish to request a refund of your unused prepaid wallet balance, you must contact us within fourteen (14) days of the relevant top-up transaction. Please send an email to startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com with your registered email, payment date, and payment transaction reference from Razorpay.

We review each request fairly. Approved refunds for unused balance are typically processed within seven (7) business days to the original payment method where possible. OTPs and SMS messages already sent and successfully processed are non-refundable, as telecom and network delivery costs are incurred at send time.

4. Eligible Refund Scenarios

We may issue refunds or wallet credits in the following situations:

  • Billing errors: If you were charged incorrectly due to a system calculation error, we will credit your wallet or issue a refund for the overcharged amount.
  • Duplicate transactions: If your payment method was charged twice for the same wallet top-up, we will refund the duplicate transaction.
  • Outage compensation: If our API experiences sustained downtime (more than 4 consecutive hours) that prevents message delivery, we will credit your wallet proportionally for the affected period.

5. Non-Eligible Scenarios

Refunds will NOT be issued for:

  • Messages that are accepted and processed through our API (regardless of delivery status on the end-user device, as telecom costs are incurred at send time).
  • Change of mind or decision to discontinue using the service after 14 days from top-up.
  • Accounts suspended or terminated due to violation of TRAI guidelines, DLT rules, or our Terms of Use (e.g., sending spam or phishing messages).

6. Disputes and Support

For delivery issues, failed sends, or billing questions, reach out to our support team. We aim to resolve billing disputes promptly and will provide clarification on charges tied to your API usage and message logs where applicable.

7. Contact

For refund inquiries: startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com | Phone: +91 6376383348 | WhatsApp: +91 6376383348

ملاحظة: تم توفير سياسة الاسترداد هذه باللغة الإنجليزية لضمان الدقة القانونية. النسخة الإنجليزية هي المستند الرسمي الذي يحكم استخدام خدماتنا. النسخة الكاملة متوفرة أدناه.

content.tr:
Not: Bu iade politikası, yasal doğruluğu sağlamak amacıyla İngilizce olarak sunulmuştur. İngilizce sürüm, hizmetlerimizin kullanımını düzenleyen resmi belgedir. Tam sürüm aşağıda sunulmuştur.
